query:
SELECT 'ledger' as type, availableCash, initialCapital FROM paperLedger LIMIT 5;
SELECT 'positions' as type, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(allocatedCapital) as totalAllocated, SUM(unrealizedPnl) as totalPnl FROM paperPositions WHERE status='open';
